title: Hardcoded password in source code
description: A hardcoded password was found in the authentication controller.
remediation: Remove hardcoded credentials and use environment variables or a secrets manager.

title: Unsanitized user input in SQL query
description: User input is directly concatenated into SQL query without parameterization.
remediation: Use prepared statements or parameterized queries.

title: User-controlled data written to logs
description: User input written to log file without sanitization.

title: Weak encryption algorithm (DES) used
description: DES encryption is considered cryptographically weak.

title: Sensitive data stored in cleartext
description: Account balance stored in SharedPreferences without encryption.
remediation: Encrypt sensitive data before storing locally.

title: Reflected XSS in transaction description
description: Transaction description field reflected without encoding.
remediation: Encode all output before rendering in HTML.

title: Path traversal in file download endpoint
description: File path constructed from user input without validation.
remediation: Validate and sanitize file path inputs.
